Machine washable: Washable at 30°, air dry;Small, great for for home and travel.
Made for small, curious hands: Size 28 x 28cm baby blanket comforter which is ideal for baby to use while on a stroller, car seat or crib.

description: Product Description The Perfect Gift for Newborns Soft and Cuddly Baby Comforter Blanket for Soothing Comfort Introduce your little one to the ultimate snuggle companion with our soft and safe baby comforter blanket. Crafted with high-quality materials, this adorable plush toy provides a cozy and secure feeling, helping your baby sleep soundly and feel at ease. Uncertain about gifts to add for baby? UNMOT New Baby Gifts Struggling between choosing something adorable or practical? Look no further! Our incredible baby gift has you covered if you're searching for a distinctive present for a baby shower. The UNMOT Baby Comforter is meticulously crafted to fulfill the requirements of newborns and their mothers. Every accessories in this blancket is handpicked with utmost care to prioritize the safety and comfort of the baby. Send this gift to warmly greet and embrace a precious little one! Cuddly design baby comforter-Baby essentials for newborn Built-in Bell Featuring a built-in bell within its head, this item emits a gentle jingle when shaken, captivating your baby's attention with its delightful sound. Crinkle ears Crinkle ears produce engaging sounds that stimulate sensory development and encourage playful exploration. Soft Teether This soft teether soothes sore gums with a gentle, chewable surface for teething comfort. Engaging Sensory Tags Textured fabric tags engage curious little fingers, encouraging sensory play & discovery. Previous page For Baby's Calm, Parents' Ease Helps babies fall asleep faster, saving parents time and effort on comforting. Adorable Elephant Friend Charming elephant design captivates babies and delivers delightful playtime fun. The Perfect Baby Gift An economical and practical gift, perfect for newborns, infants, and toddlers. Next page 1 Sleep soothing toys 2 Baby Soft Toy 3 Baby Gifts
